name: Hermits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Mix brown sugar, shortening, butter, coffee, and eggs in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Stir in flour, baking soda, nutmeg, cinnamon, and salt.
4. Gently fold in raisins and chopped nuts.
5. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until the cookies are almost no longer indented when touched.
7. Allow the cookies to cool slightly before removing them from the cookie sheet.
